name: Model Router
description: Intelligent task routing between local Ollama models and cloud AI APIs. Saves cost by running simple tasks locally and routing complex tasks to stronger models.
author: songchao0421

local_model.description: Local Ollama model for simple tasks

api_provider.description: Cloud API provider for complex tasks

monthly_budget_usd.description: Monthly API spending limit in USD

auto_route.description: Enable automatic routing (disable to always use local)
